common.minRenewalHelper: Shortest renewal period a member may request for their circle wallet's budget
common.feePpmHelper: Per-million fee charged on payments made by circle wallets (0 = free)

pubkeyInput.defaultHelper: Used to resolve your following list for member authorization
pubkeyInput.invalidHelper: Doesn't look like a valid npub, hex pubkey, nprofile, or NIP-05 address

followingPreview.empty: This identity isn't following anyone yet — members will be authorized automatically as they're followed.
followingPreview.summary_one: {{count}} person will be authorized now, and the list stays in sync automatically as this identity follows or unfollows others.
followingPreview.summary_other: {{count}} people will be authorized now, and the list stays in sync automatically as this identity follows or unfollows others.

errors.loadRecipients: Failed to load JIT wallet recipients

manageIdentities.title: Manage identities
manageIdentities.description: Identities still attached to a circle can't be deleted — remove them from every circle first.
manageIdentities.stillUsedBy_one: Still used by {{count}} circle — remove it from those first.
manageIdentities.stillUsedBy_other: Still used by {{count}} circles — remove it from those first.
manageIdentities.deleteDescription: This identity isn't attached to any circle. Deleting it can't be undone.

circleAllowlist.description: Manage which nostr pubkeys are authorized to request a wallet from this Circle Wallet Hub.
circleAllowlist.sharedWarning_one: This identity is shared by {{count}} other circle — changes here apply to all of them.
circleAllowlist.sharedWarning_other: This identity is shared by {{count}} other circles — changes here apply to all of them.
circleAllowlist.removeMemberDescription: They will no longer be able to request a wallet from this Circle Wallet Hub. This can't be undone.

circleWallets.description: Wallets already created for members of this circle.
circleWallets.removeDescription: Its remaining balance will be transferred back to this hub, and its NWC connection will stop working immediately. This can't be undone.
circleWallets.removeSelectedDescription: Their remaining balances will be transferred back to this hub, and their NWC connections will stop working immediately. This can't be undone.

errors.removeSelected: Failed to remove selected circle wallets

jitHubAllocations.pubkeyHelper: Search by name, NIP-05, or paste an npub/hex/nprofile
jitHubAllocations.iaPubkeyHelper: Must be a trusted Identity Authority (Settings → Identity Authorities)
jitHubAllocations.duplicateIdentity: This identity is already used by another recipient in this wallet. Each recipient needs a distinct identity.
jitHubAllocations.requestedSummaryWithMax: {{total}} loki requested of this hub's max wallet budget of {{max}} loki
jitHubAllocations.deadlineExceeds: Exceeds this hub's max claim deadline of {{max}}
jitHubAllocations.deadlineHelp: Every recipient must claim their slice within this long of creation
jitHubAllocations.deadlineHelpWithMax: Every recipient must claim their slice within this long of creation (defaults to this hub's max: {{max}})
jitHubAllocations.selectAllInWallet: Select all recipients in this wallet
jitHubAllocations.noneOnPage: No JIT wallets on this page.
jitHubAllocations.removeRecipientDescription: This identity will no longer be able to claim its slice of this wallet. Its allocated balance will be transferred back to this hub. This can't be undone.
jitHubAllocations.removeWalletDescription: This wallet's remaining balance will be transferred back to this hub, and its NWC connection will stop working immediately. If this wallet serves other recipients, they will lose access too — including anyone who hasn't claimed their slice yet. This can't be undone.
jitHubAllocations.removeSelectedDescription: These identities will no longer be able to claim their slice of their wallets. Their allocated balances will be transferred back to this hub. This can't be undone.
jitHubAllocations.createdToast_other: JIT wallet created and funded for {{count}} recipients

errors.loadConnection: Failed to load JIT wallet connection

newCircleHub.title: New Circle Wallet Hub
newCircleHub.description: Create a Circle Wallet Hub — a shared wallet pool where authorized members receive their own circle wallet funded from its balance.
newCircleHub.identityReuseHelper: An identity (policy + members) can be reused across multiple circles, which then stay in sync automatically.
newCircleHub.enterIdentityHelper: Enter a valid Nostr identity above to continue.
newCircleHub.memberModeLabel: Who can request a wallet from this circle
newCircleHub.modeSyncDescription: Automatic — everyone this identity follows, now or later. Nothing to manage.
newCircleHub.modePinnedDescription: Search Nostr and hand-pick exactly who's allowed.
newCircleHub.pinMemberHelper: Pin at least one member, or switch to Anyone I follow.
newCircleHub.identityNameHelper: Used only to identify this saved identity when reused across circles — not published anywhere.
newCircleHub.maxWalletBudgetHelper: Maximum budget a member may request for their circle wallet
newCircleHub.maxExpiryHelper: Maximum lifetime for issued circle wallets
newCircleHub.hubBudgetHelper: Caps the combined budget of every wallet this circle can have live at once. Leave blank for no cap beyond this hub's real balance.
newCircleHub.hubBudgetRenewalHelper: Doesn't reset the cap above — it's a live ceiling on wallets held at once, not a spend rate. Capacity frees up automatically as wallets expire.
newCircleHub.hubExpiryHelper: This circle stops issuing new wallets after this date.
newCircleHub.selectExistingHint: Select an existing identity to continue.
newCircleHub.allowlistSeedFailedToast: Circle Wallet Hub "{{name}}" created, but seeding the member list failed — add members from the hub's Allowlist page.

errors.create: Failed to create Circle Wallet Hub

newJitHub.title: New JIT Wallet Hub
newJitHub.description: Create a pre-funded hub that issues spend-only JIT wallets to beneficiaries
newJitHub.maxWalletBudgetHelper: Maximum budget that can be allocated to each JIT wallet issued from this hub
newJitHub.maxExpiryHelper: Maximum lifetime for issued JIT wallets

errors.create: Failed to create JIT Wallet Hub

disconnectCircleHub.title: Are you sure you want to delete this circle?
disconnectCircleHub.allEmpty: Every member wallet in this circle is empty. Deleting the circle will also delete all of its member wallets.
disconnectCircleHub.hasBalance_one: {{count}} member wallet in this circle still holds a balance. Deleting a wallet doesn't destroy those funds, but it does remove the member's own record of and access to them, with no way to get it back.
disconnectCircleHub.hasBalance_other: {{count}} member wallets in this circle still hold a balance. Deleting a wallet doesn't destroy those funds, but it does remove the member's own record of and access to them, with no way to get it back.
disconnectCircleHub.partialDeleteDescription_one: {{count}} wallet with balance was left untouched — the circle was not deleted.
disconnectCircleHub.partialDeleteDescription_other: {{count}} wallets with balance were left untouched — the circle was not deleted.

disconnectJitHub.title: Are you sure you want to delete this JIT Wallet Hub?
disconnectJitHub.hasOutstanding_one: This hub still has {{count}} recipient slice across its issued JIT wallets. Remove them from the JIT Wallets list below (or wait for them to expire) before deleting the hub.
disconnectJitHub.hasOutstanding_other: This hub still has {{count}} recipient slices across its issued JIT wallets. Remove them from the JIT Wallets list below (or wait for them to expire) before deleting the hub.
disconnectJitHub.safeToDelete: Connected apps will no longer be able to use this connection. No funds will be lost during this process, the balance will remain in your wallet.

errors.check: Failed to check issued JIT wallets
